skill_purpose: Review comparative advertising claims for baseline product, test method, and measurable difference disclosure.
summary: Detects comparative and superiority claims missing benchmark product, test conditions, or measurable difference; guides reviewers to require fair-comparison substantiation.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Comparative, versus, or ranking language against competitors or industry standards. ACTION: Identify whether baseline product and test method are stated. CHECK: Headlines, charts, and side-by-side imagery for missing comparison context. ESCALATE IF: Superiority claim lacks identifiable benchmark — route to Rule Corpus for binding decision.

detection_patterns.description: Comparative claims missing baseline product or test conditions.

checkpoint_actions: Confirm comparison baseline product is named
Verify test method and conditions are disclosed
Check that measurable difference is stated clearly
escalation_hints: Escalate when competitor is identifiable but test conditions are absent
Escalate when chart or graph implies superiority without axis labels
